case.title: ORING v. STATE BAR OF CALIFORNIA

opinion.h1: ORING v. STATE BAR OF CALIFORNIA, 488 U.S. 590 (1989)
opinion.h4: ORING v. STATE BAR OF CALIFORNIA APPEAL FROM THE SUPREME COURT OF CALIFORNIA No. 87-1224. Argued January 10, 1988 Decided January 23, 1989
opinion.p: Theodore A. Cohen argued the cause for appellant. With him on the briefs was Scott Spolin.
Diane C. Yu argued the cause for appellee. With her on the brief were Truitt A. Richey, Jr., and Erica Tabachnick.
The appeal is dismissed for want of a properly presented federal question.
